headline: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Valuation Check After Earnings Beat Guidance Upgrade And Debt Reduction
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) is back in focus after first quarter earnings and revenue exceeded analyst expectations, guidance was raised, and proceeds from the Aerospace Fasteners sale were used to reduce debt. See our latest analysis for Stanley Black & Decker. The earnings surprise, higher guidance and debt reduction have come alongside a 1 month share price return of 9.99% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 38.97%. However, the 5 year total shareholder return remains negative at...
